purpose: Web-readable GRPO report data bundle. Contains plots plus compact TensorBoard-derived CSV/JSON tables.

baseline.notes: Original course reward: strict full-template format, approximate tag format, bracketed answer correctness, and numeric fallback.

gsm8k_verifiable_simple.notes: Numeric GSM8K-style correctness plus a small answer-tag helper.

gsm8k_verifiable_format.notes: Current R1/R4 reward: numeric correctness, answer-tag helper, and explicit reasoning/answer envelope reward.

omitted_large_local_sources.reason: omitted from Git package because it is large; local raw artifact remains under artifacts/cloud
